reviews.review_description: Got this when it came out and now it’s free and have to pay again for the full game how is this dev getting away with this meta? Want a refund don’t care about 14 days return if devs can do this we can ask for money back whenever we want surely, 0 stars

developer_response.body: We truly apologize for the inconvenience. Reach out to us via Discord or socials and with confirmation of your purchase so we can send you your key. We contacted all of our paid players before going F2P to login at least once so this does not happen, so you must have missed our message! Thank you for your patience and support.

reviews.review_description: We tried many times to get past the room scan screen,  every time we would scan it would just go back to to the room scan setup again. Over and over again. Will be reaching out to request a refund.

developer_response.body: Hey OrangeFoxRider, we believe this to be an issue with your Quest 3's room scanning functionality, an issue we have faced in the past. Please try clearing your room scan data and performing the room scan from the Quest menu before launching Jungle Man. If you need more troubleshooting assistance, please join the Fun Train Discord and submit a bug report. Thank you, and I hope this helps you enjoy Jungle Man

reviews.review_description:
This is a fantastic experience. The difficulty curve and variety is handled so well, despite being a mixed reality game where levels have to conform to your space..and everyone's space is so different. 

There appears to be a bug where, if you try to load a level in a room that isn't supported, you get stuck beating the drums. Nothing ever happens. I got around this by rescanning my room and restarting my headset, but I wish there was some kind of error message displayed to me. Other than this, I have had such a great time. Bravo, dev team!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much and we are happy to hear you're enjoying the challenge.  We put a lot of love into Jungle Man, and you may see more of him in the coming months!

reviews.review_title: Tarzan meets Angry Birds in your room
reviews.review_description:
Sounds like a joke but it’s a good one. 
Innovative. Good onboarding and narration  Could use some polish with controls. my pinch gesture wasn’t always recognized, but other than that it’s pretty good. Looking forward to more levels and content.

developer_response.body: This is high praise, because we love Angry Birds too.  Meta is rolling out even more improvements to hand tracking (and gesture tracking) so look out for those updates.  There is more coming for Jungle Man next year!

reviews.review_description:
This is fun, but I don't want to play with hand tracking.  Controllers are always better than hand tracking and should be first choice with hand tracking as an option.  And I think it is a mistake to be required to put down the controllers before you scan your room as it make it difficult to edit the scan. 
I can concede that maybe it is best to scan your room, before starting the game, but the quest room scanning is too sketchy for the game to depend on this. The game should anticipate that you might need to scan or re scan your room and use the controllers until you are ready to play.
Moving, swinging, and climbing around your room feels playful and surprisingly active. Easy to jump into for a quick session, and a solid free-to-play pick if you want something light and different.

reviews.review_title: great make a jungle of your home ?
reviews.review_description:
or is it already a mess then lets hope jungleman clean it first up before he go swinging around ?
i have fun in my garage ;-))

reviews.review_title: The Funniest Faceplant You’ll Ever Have
reviews.review_description:
If you've ever wanted to become a shirtless, overly confident jungle lunatic flailing through the wild with nothing but your hands and poor decision-making skills, Jungle Man is your chaotic dream come true. 

From the twisted geniuses behind The Exorcist: Legion VR, The Twilight Zone VR, and Tarzan VR, comes a title that throws horror out the window and swings full-speed into hilarity. Jungle Man, built for Meta Quest 3/3s with hand-tracking and mixed reality, turns your living room or backyard into a slapstick jungle obstacle course that’ll have you laughing, sweating, and possibly apologizing to your furniture.

No Controllers. No Rules. No Chill. That’s right, Jungle Man uses full hand tracking, so you’re literally swinging from vines, grabbing bananas, and smacking angry bees like your life (or at least your pride) depends on it. Forget button combos. Here, it’s just you, your reflexes, and the sheer will to not faceplant into your coffee table.

Failure? It’s the Whole Point. You will fall. You will scream. And you will laugh until you’re wheezing. Whether you’re missing a vine by inches or getting blasted by an angry mosquito squadron, every failure is a highlight reel. It's part action-puzzler, part physical comedy show starring you and Jungle Man, your love-struck alter ego who may or may not be pursuing a romance that’s doomed from the start.

The Jumping Jungle, Slippery Swamp, and Volcanic Vein serve up 20+ levels of unpredictable chaos. Procedurally generated layouts mean no two runs are the same, and just when you think you’ve figured it out, a snake wraps you up like a lunch burrito.

Collect bananas for grip boosts, oranges for mega-jumps, and coconuts for, well... coconut-style body armor. Earn relics to unlock wild outfits and trick out Jungle Man for his hopeless quest to win over a potential bride, casual fling, or possibly just someone who’ll tolerate him. It’s romantic in a sweaty, bug-infested kind of way.

Jungle Man is a ridiculous, exhilarating blast. It's not here to scare you or tell a deep story— it’s here to make you laugh, fall, and get back up swinging. Whether you're inside a tight 10x10 room or outside dodging mosquitos mid-vine-swing, it’s one of the most creative uses of mixed reality I’ve seen. The more you fail, the funnier it gets— and that’s exactly the point.

Verdict: 5/5 faceplants.
Grab it, swing hard, and prepare to laugh your leafy butt off.

Check out my video on YT @misschiefvr.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a glowing review!  We hope you can make it to the end. Jungle Man needs you!

reviews.review_description: This game is actually so great! Finally a Mixed Reality game that is not just another tech demo. Jungle Man is actually fun and addicting! I love the procedurally generated levels and how much I need to strategize in order to beat the game. Every level is a new puzzle. I was honestly losing my hope in MR but this game proved me wrong.

On the out set the cartoony graphics may make you think this is for kids, oh no that’s not the case, put down the controllers and have the best fun ever in hands free chaotic jungle fun.

I have had a total blast with this already, who cares if I fail time after time, this falling off the vines is hilarious.
Now you need quite a bit of space and either Quest 3 or Quest 3S, with an easy tutorial to set up your room, and with a pinch of your fingers draw back the vine and let it go.

From one side of the room to the other, I was totally entertained, Jungle man is my new vr hero.
The mixed reality is some of the best on quest.
It’s just so much fun and that’s what’s games should be.
Well done to Fun Train and MEGAVERSE you have developed a fabulous game.

reviews.review_title: Swing, Jump & Laugh in Your Living Room!
reviews.review_description:
Jungle Man is a brilliantly fun mixed reality experience that transforms your living space into a wild vine-swinging playground. Using only hand tracking, you step into the role of a jungle hero—part Tarzan, part chaotic adventurer—navigating trees, ropes, and hilarious hazards.

The animations are a standout: whether missing a vine and splashing into water or tumbling to the floor, every fall feels uniquely crafted. Add to that the main character’s allergy to bees—which leads to frantic and funny moments of swatting and dodging—and you’ve got a game filled with energy and charm.

Collecting fruit lets you climb higher or leap further, and there’s a strong sense of connection between the player and the animated character, making the immersion feel deeper than expected for an MR title. Jungle Man is joyful, addictive, and one of the most entertaining uses of mixed reality and hand tracking to date. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you, there are many more enemies than bees. The further you get in the game, new enemies appear, with unique ways to counter them.   Wait until you get to the ash locusts!

reviews.review_description:
This is  is an absolute blast! The movement mechanics are real time fun—swinging, jumping, and climbing through the jungle whilst grabbing bananas, oranges and swatting wasps and as you progress more and more obstacles getting in your way. The physics are spot on, and the game rewards creativity and momentum in the best way possible.
Visually its cartoony but that does not mean it’s bad or not for adults, it's vibrant and immersive, with lush environments that really make you feel like you're deep in the wild. The controls are intuitive and great hand tracking. Whether you're playing casually or trying to master every route, there's tons of replay value here.
This is one of those games that reminds you why MR VR is so amazing. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a fun, physical, and downright hilarious VR experience but be warned you do need space to play, I was out in my garden to play lots of laughs I must have looked a right ole sight!

developer_response.body: Glad you're enjoying the game.   We're glad you enjoyed the hand tracking so much.

reviews.review_description: Hand tracking that actually worked!!  This game is so well done! I'm surprised it was so cheap. The graphics are great. The game play gets you out of the chair and moving.  I haven't played very long but what I have is really cute. My first miss of the Vine had me laughing instead of getting mad. Well done developers!   I can't wait to play more!!

You know it’s addictive when you can see the sun setting through your window in mixed reality. But seriously this is something you can just get sucked into for a while. It feels weird to call this a puzzle game because it’s structured like a platformer, but it’ll really get your brain going for some levels and enemies. Art style and animations are super fun too!

For me, Jungle is the first Mixed Reality Game that takes full advantage of all the features available for hand tracking. I have so much fun venturing myself through all the levels and thinking on the best possible route to the most relics. Recommend it 100%!!!

reviews.review_title: The most fun and creative MR game
reviews.review_description: I fell in love with this game on the first playthrough. Jungle Man is so fun! I love swinging him across my living room and even when he dies is hilarious! The best MR game ever!

Jungle man is my new hero. This is a lot of fun. Easy to learn and the hand tracking for this game is outstanding. This is the perfect family game for all ages.  Don't Monkey around. It really is a jungle out there so let Jungle Man be your guide.

developer_response.body: Thank you. Glad you're enjoying it.

reviews.review_description: Really feels like the sort of game that introduces to you the concept of hand tracking. And reminds me of the mindless fun that early game like angry birds, geometry dash, temple run, etc were.

developer_response.body: Thank you. We worked really hard to make sure the hand tracking was as easy and intuitive as possible.

reviews.review_description: I’ve only played a few times, but this game is definitely worth it. Turn your living into a jungle with vines hanging from your ceiling. It’s challenging.!

developer_response.body: Have you gotten to the swamp levels yet?

reviews.review_description: This game does exactly what it needs to do: let you have fun. I’m juggling having to slap bees, dodge vines, grab power-ups, and get back to the vine in seconds! Last time I felt this way was playing Mario games when I was a kid. Also I absolutely love the little blowdart dudes and bats in the Volcano levels! I’d pay for a plushie of those critters
My kids are loving this right now! What a workout!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear.  Watch out for murder hornets.

reviews.review_description: Fun platformer right in my living room!

reviews.review_title: Tarzan escaped jungles to your room!
reviews.review_description: Fun little gem game with cute characters and dangerous enemies, smart use of hands tracking
Awesome concept and top tier mixed reality gameplay. Plus it has Quest Achievements!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and glad you're enjoying.  The achievements also award relics!

reviews.review_description: Jungle man is a mini Tarzan.

developer_response.body: Well, he tries, but often falls flat.

reviews.review_description: It’s challenging, funny, and the mixed reality is so much fun!

developer_response.body: We think so too. Glad you are enjoying the game. It's really special.

reviews.review_description: Looks great , have re-scored and look forward to spending time in the jungle.

developer_response.body: Hey Nowtleft! Have you played the bongos to start the level? Can you please email us at jungleman@funtrainvr.com ? We'd be happy to help!

reviews.review_description: Had to re scan.

developer_response.body:
Hey chimana,

Please reach out to us on our Discord https://discord.gg/CKnd3jWP or email jungleman@funtrainvr.com so we can help you fix this issue!
